channel.title: GitHub Dart Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Dart in GitHub

item.title: KRTirtho/spotube
item.description: 🎧 Open source Spotify client that doesn't require Premium nor uses Electron! Available for both desktop & mobile!

item.title: ente-io/ente
item.description: Fully open source, End to End Encrypted alternative to Google Photos and Apple Photos

item.title: flutter/samples
item.description: A collection of Flutter examples and demos

item.title: chen08209/FlClash
item.description: A multi-platform proxy client based on ClashMeta,simple and easy to use, open-source and ad-free.

item.title: foss42/apidash
item.description: API Dash is a beautiful open-source cross-platform (macOS, Windows, Linux, Android & iOS) API Client built using Flutter which can help you easily create & customize your API requests, visually inspect responses and generate API integration code. A lightweight alternative to postman/insomnia.

item.title: jameskokoska/Cashew
item.description: 💸 An app created to help users manage a budget and purchases

item.title: Notsfsssf/pixez-flutter
item.description: 一个支持免代理直连及查看动图的第三方Pixiv flutter客户端

item.title: academind/flutter-complete-guide-course-resources
item.description: Course resources (code snapshots & slides) for our complete Flutter & Dart course (https://acad.link/flutter).

item.title: rrousselGit/riverpod
item.description: A reactive caching and data-binding framework. Riverpod makes working with asynchronous code a breeze.

item.title: abuanwar072/E-commerce-Complete-Flutter-UI
item.description: The FlutterShop template makes it easier to develop an e-commerce app using Flutter. It includes all the necessary pages to build a shopping app for both Android and iOS using flutter.

item.title: cake-tech/cake_wallet
item.description: The open source repository for Cake Wallet, a noncustodial multi-currency wallet, and Monero.com, a noncustodial Monero-only wallet. Need help? Check out https://guides.cakewallet.com

item.title: mulaRahul/keyviz
item.description: Keyviz is a free and open-source tool to visualize your keystrokes ⌨️ and 🖱️ mouse actions in real-time.

item.title: flutter/flutter
item.description: Flutter makes it easy and fast to build beautiful apps for mobile and beyond

item.title: hiddify/hiddify-app
item.description: Multi-platform auto-proxy client, supporting Sing-box, X-ray, TUIC, Hysteria, Reality, Trojan, SSH etc. It’s an open-source, secure and ad-free.

item.title: shorebirdtech/shorebird
item.description: Code Push for Flutter and other tools for Flutter businesses.

item.title: TheLastGimbus/GooglePhotosTakeoutHelper
item.description: Script that organizes the Google Takeout archive into one big chronological folder

item.title: AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
item.description: Bring projects, wikis, and teams together with AI. AppFlowy is an AI collaborative workspace where you achieve more without losing control of your data. The best open source alternative to Notion.

item.title: imaNNeo/fl_chart
item.description: FL Chart is a highly customizable Flutter chart library that supports Line Chart, Bar Chart, Pie Chart, Scatter Chart, and Radar Chart.
